attributes.description: Alerts when 5xx responses exceed 5% of access logs. Server-side errors directly impact users.
attributes.name: [Nginx OTel] High 5xx error rate

investigation_guide.blob:
## NGINX high 5xx error rate

### What fired
5xx response rate exceeded 5% over the window (min 50 total requests).

### Why it matters
5xx errors are server-side — upstream failures, misconfigured proxying, or NGINX internal errors. Usually client-visible outages.

### Triage
1. Inspect error log for correlated entries.
2. Check upstream application health.

### Remediation
- Roll back or fix the offending upstream.

### Tuning
- 5% threshold; tighten per SLA.
